findings.summary: Power generation sub-sheet of ElonMux power mux design with LTC3126 buck converter. Vout estimation wrong due to heuristic Vref; BQ25756E feedback divider missed; lib_name/lib_id mismatch causes 0-pin parsing.

incorrect.description: LTC3126 estimated_vout=2.41V using assumed Vref=0.6V -- actual Vref=0.8V (VSET pins to GND), correct Vout=3.3V matching +3V3 output rail
IC801/IC802 LTC7000EMSE gate drivers have 0 pins parsed due to lib_name/lib_id mismatch -- lib_symbols keyed by local name but lookup uses lib_id

missed.description: R701/R702 (5 milliohm, 1W) current sense resistors on ACP/ACN and SRP/SRN pins not detected

suggestions: Voltage divider detector should accept dedicated feedback ground pins (FBG, AGND, etc.) as bottom reference
Fix lib_name/lib_id mismatch: try lib_name first, then lib_id for lib_symbol lookup
Add TPS370x to voltage supervisor/detector classification
